Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation occurring as the first activity in a case
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of variants where Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation is immediately followed by SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'

Name: Number of times Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation occurs before SW-Reviewer Agreed in the same case
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases containing Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation that eventually lead to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation in cases that end with SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation activities that are part of variants with performance duration above the median
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all cases

Name: Ratio of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to Manuscript Export Succeeded across all cases
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Percentage of variants starting with Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation that include at least one reviewer invitation reminder (Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2)
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Frequency of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation appearing in cases that experience reviewer unavailability (SW-Reviewer Unavailable or SW-Reviewer Declined)
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation occurrences that are followed within 24 hours by Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Number of distinct cases where Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation is recorded
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation activities that occur in cases later involving SW-Reviewer Agreed at least once
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation in comparison to SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion across the entire log
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'

Name: Percentage of variants containing Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation that proceed to a revision stage (e.g., SW-EIC Major Revision or SW-EIC Minor Revision)
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'SW-EIC Major Revision'
